name: Bug report
about: Something does not work as described in docs/README
labels: bug

## What Happened

<!-- In a few words: what did you try, and what happened instead? -->

## Minimal Reproduction

This is the most important part. Without it, a bug is very hard to fix.

Good options:
- a link to a small GitHub repository;
- an inline snippet that can be pasted into `examples/basic/main.ts`;
- a StackBlitz/CodePen link.

If you cannot minimize it, include:
- the relevant TS page/component code;
- the browser console error stack.

```ts
// your code here
```

## Expected Behavior

<!-- Describe what should have happened. -->

## Actual Behavior

<!-- Describe what actually happened, including error stacks. -->
